rules.description: Fn Layer: Caps Lock + key → Programming Symbols
Fn Layer: Caps Lock → Fn (held) / Escape (tap)
Combo: Y + U → Ctrl+B+n (tmux next window)
Combo: D + F → Caps Lock (Caps Word equivalent)
Achordion: A (Ctrl) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: S (Cmd) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: D (Shift) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: F (Option) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: J (Option) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: K (Shift) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: L (Cmd) base — set variable on press, letter on tap
Achordion: ; (Ctrl) base + tap dance — hold=Ctrl, tap=;, double-tap=:
One-Shot Shift: Left Shift tap → sticky shift
One-Shot Shift: Right Shift tap → sticky shift
